criteria.subject: Requested deliverable is a minimal Neovim configuration implementation
criteria.description: [E] Deliverable type validation: Gertel requested an implementation fix, not another diagnosis or broad refactor. Verification: the artifact is a code patch in custom Neovim config targeting the remaining headless Colorizer error.
criteria.evidence: Patched `/Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` and verified with `git diff --no-ext-diff -- nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`. The work product is a minimal implementation in custom Neovim config, not a diagnosis-only response.

criteria.subject: Headless Neovim no longer reports termguicolors Colorizer error
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-1. Verification: a headless Neovim run no longer emits `Colorizer: Error: &termguicolors must be set` in stderr/stdout.
criteria.evidence: Ran `nvim --headless '+edit /Users/lgertel/dotfiles/site/src/styles/custom.css' '+edit /Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua' '+qa' 2>&1`. Actual flags: `__HAS_TERMGUI__=0`, `__HAS_ATTACH__=0`, `__HAS_E492__=0`, exit code `0`. Threshold: no `Colorizer: Error: &termguicolors must be set`. PASS.

criteria.subject: Previous ColorizerAttachToBuffer patch remains present after fix
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-3. Verification: `tailwind-tools.lua` still uses the Lua API attachment path and does not reintroduce `vim.cmd("ColorizerAttachToBuffer")`.
criteria.evidence: Read patched file and confirmed prior fix remains present: `nvchadcolorizer.attach_to_buffer(0)` still exists at line 32. Anti-check: `grep -F 'ColorizerAttachToBuffer' .../tailwind-tools.lua` found 0 matches, so the old command was not reintroduced.

criteria.subject: Patch stays within custom Neovim colorizer configuration area
criteria.description: [I] Verification: edits remain in the identified custom colorizer/tailwind config area unless strictly required otherwise.
criteria.evidence: Scope check: `git diff --name-only --no-ext-diff` listed 3 modified repo files total, but only 1 Neovim colorizer config file: `nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`. The fix stayed in the custom colorizer configuration area.

criteria.subject: Fix guards colorizer attachment during headless non-guicolor sessions
criteria.description: [I] Verification: the implementation prevents colorizer attachment when `termguicolors` is unavailable in headless execution, or otherwise makes the callback safe under that condition.
criteria.evidence: Read file and grep verified guard expression `#vim.api.nvim_list_uis() == 0 or not vim.o.termguicolors` appears 2 times: once at config-function entry and once in the autocmd callback. This explicitly prevents colorizer setup/attachment in headless or non-guicolor sessions.

criteria.subject: Patch scope remains minimal inside custom Neovim config
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-2. Verification: the diff is narrowly limited to the diagnosed custom configuration behavior and avoids broad cleanup.
criteria.evidence: `git diff --no-ext-diff -- nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` shows changes in 2 localized spots within 1 file: a top-level early return and a callback guard around the existing attach call. Actual modified Neovim config files: 1. Threshold for minimal scope: stay in diagnosed custom config only. PASS.

criteria.subject: Unrelated Neovim configuration files remain unmodified by fix
criteria.description: [E] Anti-criterion from scope boundary. Verification: no unrelated Neovim config files are changed by the implementation diff.
criteria.evidence: Negative scope check: `git diff --name-only --no-ext-diff` listed unrelated dirty files (`aerospace/.config/aerospace/aerospace.toml`, `nvim/.config/nvim/lazy-lock.json`) plus the target file. Count of unrelated Neovim config files changed by this fix: 0. PASS.

criteria.subject: Fix does not rewrite existing plugin selection destructively
criteria.description: [E] Anti-criterion from scope boundary. Verification: the implementation keeps current plugins and avoids broad removal or replacement.
criteria.evidence: Read `tailwind-tools.lua` after patch: plugin selections remain `roobert/tailwindcss-colorizer-cmp.nvim` and `NvChad/nvim-colorizer.lua`. Negative check found 0 plugin removals or replacements; only guards were added around existing setup/attach logic.

criteria.subject: Tailwind colorizer setup remains configured after headless fix
criteria.description: [I] Verification: `tailwindcss-colorizer-cmp` setup remains present after the patch, preserving the current Tailwind colorizer behavior.
criteria.evidence: `grep -F 'tailwindcolorizer.setup' .../tailwind-tools.lua` returned the setup block at lines 22-24 with `color_square_width = 2`. Tailwind colorizer setup remains configured after the headless fix.
